summary: Completed testing of Seller Verification Badge, Bulk Operations, Export Features, and PWA Manifest. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified and working correctly. Fixed 2 backend bugs during testing.
passed_tests: Featured auctions API returns seller_verified field
Search auctions API returns seller_verified field
Bulk user operations - invalid action returns 400
Bulk payout operations - invalid action returns 400
PWA manifest has required fields (name, short_name, start_url, display, icons)
PWA manifest uses standalone display mode
PWA manifest has theme_color and background_color
Admin Dashboard shows verified badge (blue shield) next to verified sellers
Admin Dashboard shows bulk action bar when users selected
Admin Dashboard has Export dropdown with JSON/CSV options
Admin Dashboard user actions dropdown shows Verify/Remove Verification options
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed bulk operations to use Query params instead of List body
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed CSV export to handle auctions with different fields
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed CSV export to handle users with different fields

bugs_fixed.issue: Bulk operations endpoints expected List[str] as body but frontend sends comma-separated query params
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed endpoint signatures to use Query params with comma-separated string parsing

bugs_fixed.issue: CSV export for auctions failed with 'dict contains fields not in fieldnames' error
bugs_fixed.fix: Collect all unique keys from all records before creating CSV writer

seed_data_creation: Created admin user (admin@jarnnmarket.com) with email_verified=true and phone_verified=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Seller verification badges, bulk admin operations, data exports (JSON/CSV), and PWA manifest. Admin user created: admin@jarnnmarket.com / AdminPass123!. Bulk operations use query params (action=verify&user_ids=id1,id2). Export dropdown in Admin Dashboard header. Verified sellers show blue shield icon on auction cards.

mocked_apis.sms_verification: MOCKED - returns mock OTP code in response
mocked_apis.paypal: MOCKED - PayPal payments are in sandbox mode

seller_verification_badge.details: Blue shield icon shows next to verified sellers on auction cards and in admin dashboard

bulk_user_operations.details: Activate, deactivate, verify sellers via POST /api/admin/bulk/users

export_users.details: JSON and CSV export via GET /api/admin/export/users

export_auctions.details: JSON and CSV export via GET /api/admin/export/auctions

export_transactions.details: JSON and CSV export via GET /api/admin/export/transactions

pwa_manifest.details: manifest.json accessible with all required PWA fields, icons, shortcuts

admin_dashboard_ui.details: Export dropdown, bulk selection, action buttons all functional
